omega
      omega
    have h₂ : ∀ᶠ (i : ℕ) in iDist 0 (n.succ), (i : ℕ) ∈ Finset.Icc 0 n := by
      have h₃ : {i : ℕ | i ∈ Finset.Icc 0 n} = Set.Icc 0 n := by
        ext

      rw [h₃]
      have h₄ : (n.succ : ℕ) > 0 := by

    have h₃ : x.val ∈ (iDist 0 (n.succ)).support := by
      have h₄ : ∀ᶠ (i : ℕ) in iDist 0 (n.succ), (i : ℕ) ∈ Finset.Icc 0 n := h₂
      have h₅ : x.val ∈ Finset.Icc 0 n := by
        simpa only [Finset.mem_Icc] using h₁
      exact (iDist_finite.support_mem_image.mpr ⟨x.val, h₅, h₄.filter f_mem⟩)
    have h₄ : (x : ℕ) ∈ (iDist 0 (n.succ)).support := h₃
    have h₅ : x ∈ support ($[0..n]) := by
      simpa [Fin.ext_iff] using h₄
    exact h₅
